docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,584.35 FILED BY MCKENNIE, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT BERIZ, AHMADZAI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
